bird.summary: The short-billed miner (Geositta antarctica) is a species of bird in the subfamily Sclerurinae, the leaftossers and miners, of the ovenbird…

locations.name: 火地群岛
locations.summary: 火地群岛（西班牙語：Archipiélago de Tierra del Fuego）是南美洲最南端的一个群岛，由主岛火地岛及周边小岛组成，总面积73,753平方公里。其主岛火地岛西半部以及其西、南部的全部岛屿均归属于智利境內麦哲伦-智利…

locations.name: 圣克鲁斯省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 圣克鲁斯省（西班牙語：Provincia de Santa Cruz）為阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷南部，首府為里奥加耶戈斯。 聖克魯斯省下共劃分為七個區域，分別為： 科爾彭艾克縣（首府Puerto Santa Cruz） 德塞阿多縣…

locations.name: 麦哲伦-智利南极大区
locations.summary: 麦哲伦-智利南极大区（西班牙語：Región de Magallanes y de la Antártica Chilena）是智利最南端、最大、人口第二少的大区。首府蓬塔阿雷纳斯，面积132,297平方千米，人口150,826（2002…

locations.name: 门多萨省
locations.summary: 门多萨省為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，它是组成该国的24个自治州或一级司法管辖区之一，也是24个国家立法选举区之一，首府為门多萨。位於新库约地区的西南部，阿根廷西部，北领圣胡安省，东南为拉潘帕省，南领内乌肯省，西邻智利瓦尔帕莱索，由安第斯…

locations.name: 巴塔哥尼亞沙漠
locations.summary: 巴塔哥尼亞荒漠（西班牙語：Patagonia extraandina），也被稱為巴塔哥尼亞草原，是阿根廷最大的荒漠，亦為世界第七大荒漠，佔地673000平方公里。其沙漠主要位於阿根廷，智利南部，西側以安地斯山脈為界，​東側以接鄰大西洋，南…

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: It mostly breeds in Argentina on Tierra del Fuego

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: It also breeds in lesser numbers on the mainland in the southern part of Argentina's Santa Cruz Province and in southern Chile's Magallanes Region

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: It also breeds in lesser numbers on the mainland in the southern part of Argentina's Santa Cruz Province and in southern Chile's Magallanes Region

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: In the non-breeding season some move north in western Argentina as far as Mendoza Province. The short-billed miner inhabits the Patagonian Steppe, a landscape of barren plains with sparse grasses and scattered shrubs

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: In the non-breeding season some move north in western Argentina as far as Mendoza Province. The short-billed miner inhabits the Patagonian Steppe, a landscape of barren plains with sparse grasses and scattered shrubs

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: It also occurs in more temperate grasslands and in sandy coastal areas
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Short-billed miner
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified, though changes in its habitat due to climate change might affect the species in the future. It is considered fairly common to abundant
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
